title: Praetorius — Interactive Works Console
thesis_claim: Praetorius reframes online composition portfolios as executable score-time interfaces that preserve primary evidence over ornamental framing.
cybernetic_loop: Author maps score pages to media time, listener navigation repositions context, and deep links recirculate interpretation through shareable entry points.
material_system: CLI toolchain, works schema, page-follow PDF mapping, skin system, and embed-first deployment model.
agency_model: Human-authored mapping with interface-level procedural behavior that stabilizes adjudication and listening.

evidence_refs.label: Praetorius README
evidence_refs.excerpt: Praetorius provides score-centric pages with synchronized audio and page-follow PDFs so evaluators do not get lost between time and page.

evidence_refs.label: Docs Home
evidence_refs.excerpt: Skins expose the same data through different surfaces while preserving synchronized score/audio behavior.

evidence_refs.label: Data Model
evidence_refs.excerpt: The `.prae/works.json` schema stores cues and score mapping for deterministic page-follow behavior.

risk_notes: Over-custom skin choices can distract from score-time evidence if editorial hierarchy is weak.
External PDF hosts may break page control unless URL handling is validated.
